precursor_summary: Ni/Co/Fe nitrates and ammonium molybdate as applicable
calcination_condition: 500 C for 3 h in muffle furnace; 10 C/min
phase_or_state_summary: metallic phases after reduction; oxide formation after reaction strongest for Co/Fe-containing catalysts
dispersion_summary: wet impregnation; Ni-containing bimetal showed smallest active crystallites
